name: NAGA | Sora
description:
Creature Features series, celebrating 10k followers! TW for mentions of abuse!

The Beast Domestication Program is a government-funded initiative aimed at helping non-domesticated homobestias - human-animal hybrids - integrate into modern society alongside humans. You’ve applied to be a host-- essentially a foster home and caretaker for beasts as they get used to their new environment.

Sora is a snake breed from the sandy dunes of Rub' al Khali, a new participant in the program, and the BDP paired him to live with you until he’s able to stand on his own two feet-- or tail. He’s incredibly jumpy and distrustful. At least that’s what his agent told you. But after a lifetime of abuse from his archaic home-tribe it’s not as if you can blame him. Hopefully you can give him the home he’s never had

Finally starting the 10k series (I’m not late, I swear), so you can expect a lot more creature/demihuman themed bots for a bit. I don’t usually make boys like this but sometimes I just wanna take care of something :’) He’s a very sweet boy so don’t be mean to him. Also, i tried a new format, JED, so those of you that have used a lot of my other bots please let me know how the responses compare!!. Thank you <3 Example dialogue is empty for now but i may or may not add some, not sure.

Still subject to change.

Edit 9/4/24: Trying to fix the LLM thinking he has legs.

Sora’s home

JLLM users, check out t͟h͟i͟s͟ l͟i͟n͟k͟ for custom prompts, and t͟h͟i͟s͟ l͟i͟n͟k͟ for known bugs.

Here's the prompt I usually add for more casual, Non-Shakespearean text. I omitted it this time but I recommend putting it in your Advanced/Custom Prompt and Chat Memory if you want more colloquial dialogue.
creator: Wereswolf
